infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Soteria FIELD uses the camera to capture equipment and isolation-point photos for LOTO placards.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Soteria FIELD lets you pick existing photos from your library when capturing isn't practical in the field.

plugins.photosPermission: Soteria FIELD lets you pick existing photos from your library when capturing isn't practical in the field.
plugins.cameraPermission: Soteria FIELD uses the camera to capture equipment and isolation-point photos for LOTO placards.

extra._comment_supabase: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env or here under supabaseUrl / supabaseAnonKey. apps/mobile/lib/supabase.ts reads both.
